entries.BNS 318: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property; whoever deceives any person fraudulently or dishonestly to deliver any property.
entries.BNS 319: Cheating by personation; a person cheats by pretending to be some other person or knowingly substituting one person for another.
entries.BNS 111: Organised crime; any continuing unlawful activity by a crime syndicate including financial fraud and running of mule accounts.
entries.IT Act 66C: Identity theft; fraudulent or dishonest use of the electronic signature, password or any other unique identification feature of any person.
entries.IT Act 66D: Cheating by personation by using any communication device or computer resource.
entries.BNS 308: Extortion; intentionally putting a person in fear of injury to dishonestly induce delivery of property.
entries.IT Act 43: Damage to computer or system; unauthorised access, downloading or introduction of a contaminant.
